PROFILE.TITLE: My Profile
PROFILE.LOGIN_REQUIRED: Please sign in to view this page.
PROFILE.SHOWCASE_TITLE: Welcome to the Insurance BPMN Showcase
PROFILE.SHOWCASE_INFO: This application shows how a real-world business process is modelled and executed using BPMN 2.0 and a workflow engine (CIB Seven / Camunda). Submit an insurance request below to start a live process instance — then watch it progress step by step in the diagram on this page.
PROFILE.NAME: Name:
PROFILE.COMPLETE_PROFILE_INFO: Before requesting insurance, please complete your customer profile.
PROFILE.START_PROCESS_INFO: Choose an insurance type to start a new BPMN process instance.
PROFILE.START_PROCESS_DETAIL: Each request triggers a workflow in the engine. The process moves through several automated and manual steps — including a risk assessment and a review task — before a decision is reached. Watch the active step highlighted live in the diagram below.
PROFILE.PROFILE_REQUIRED: Please create a customer profile first before requesting insurance.
PROFILE.LIVE_DIAGRAM_INFO: The diagram below shows the BPMN model currently running in the workflow engine. Active steps are highlighted, completed steps are marked, and the current task shows exactly where the process is waiting.

CREATE_CUSTOMER.TITLE: Create Customer Profile
CREATE_CUSTOMER.SUBTITLE: Complete your profile to request insurance policies.

HOME.TITLE: BPMN Showcase
HOME.INTRO: BPMN — Business Process Model and Notation — is a standardized graphical language for modelling business workflows, readable by both business and technical stakeholders.
HOME.EOL: Camunda 7 reached End of Life in October 2025.
HOME.CAMUNDA8: Camunda 8 is no longer open source and has become prohibitively expensive — something many companies, especially in tighter times, are no longer willing to accept.
HOME.FORK_INFO: To keep the open-source spirit alive, Camunda 7 has been forked by several parties.
HOME.CIB_INFO: This showcase runs on CIB Seven
HOME.CIB_DESC: a strong and actively maintained fork of Camunda 7.
HOME.INVITE_TEXT: This showcase demonstrates the benefits of BPMN and a workflow engine in a clear, hands-on way. Using a fictional insurance company as an example, you can follow a real process instance step by step — from request to decision — live in the diagram.
HOME.INVITE_CTA: Create a free account and experience the process firsthand.
